sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמתי

Transliteration: shûmâthı̂y

Phonetic: shoo-maw-thee'

BDB Definition:

Shumathites = "the exalted"
  1. a descendant or inhabitant of Shumah

Origin: patronymically from an unused name from H7762 probably meaning garlic-smell

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
